articles.title: RedMagic 11S Pro in for review
articles.description: This is the RedMagic 11S Pro, and it looks just like its predecessor. But that's no bad thing, RedMagic gaming phones have their own style - no bumps, no camera islands, just flush surfaces, flat sides, good craftsmanship. The phone comes in two configs - 12/256GB and 16/512GB - and two guises - Nightfreeze and Subzero (a silver). Ours is the black (Nightfreeze) one. You get an 80W charger, a USB cable, and a nice soft-touch case that's slimmer than your usual silicone affair. The RedMagic 11S Pro is fresh on the global market and it's slightly different to its Chinese counterparts...

articles.title: 2026 Tata Tiago, Tiago EV Launch Live: Check On-Road Price, Mileage, Range, Features, Colours And Variants
articles.description: 2026 Tata Tiago, Tiago EV Launch Live: 2026 Tata Tiago and Tiago EV will launch in India today with major updates across design, cabin technology, features and equipment. Tata Motors has already revealed most of the exterior and interior changes ahead of the official price announcement, and both hatchbacks now look noticeably more premium than before. The updated Tiago gets a sharper front fascia inspired by newer Tata models, redesigned bumpers, slimmer lighting elements and a connected-style rear lightbar. The Tiago EV also adopts a cleaner EV-specific face with revised LED detailing and fresh alloy wheel designs. Interior Inside, the changes are even more extensive. Both hatchbacks receive an all-new dashboard layout with a floating touchscreen infotainment system, revised centre console and larger digital displays. Top variants will feature a 10.25-inch touchscreen, dual wireless phone chargers, rear AC vents, Type-C charging ports and a 360-degree camera, features rarely seen in this segment. Tata is also adding paddle shifters on AMT variants of both the petrol and CNG-powered Tiago, a move that could become a major talking point at launch. Mechanical Details Mechanically, the Tiago is expected to continue with the familiar 1.2-litre petrol engine along with factory-fitted CNG variants. Mileage figures are likely to remain close to the current model, which delivers around 19 kmpl in petrol form, while the CNG versions are expected to continue targeting cost-conscious city buyers. The Tiago EV is expected to retain its existing battery pack options, though Tata could fine-tune efficiency and feature packaging. The current model offers a claimed MIDC range of up to 315 km, and the facelift is expected to continue targeting urban EV buyers looking for an affordable electric hatchback. Expected Price and Rivals Expected prices for the 2026 Tata Tiago could start from around Rs 5 lakh (ex-showroom), while the Tiago EV facelift is likely to begin near the Rs 8 lakh mark. Both cars will continue rivalling hatchbacks such as the Maruti Suzuki WagonR, Celerio, Swift and Citroen eC3 EV in their respective segments.

articles.title: Google, CrowdStrike take down ‘Glassworm’ Botnet hacking attack targeting software developers
articles.description: A global tech coalition has successfully dismantled the 'Glassworm' botnet, a sophisticated threat that targeted software developers for months. By simultaneously disrupting its unique command-and-control infrastructure, which spanned blockchain, peer-to-peer networks, and legitimate web services, the operation prevented the malware from shifting to alternative communication channels. This victory significantly bolsters software supply-chain security.

articles.title: Zoho-backed Netrasemi launches its first AI chip, begins customer trials

Early trials are underway with customers in surveillance and automotive sectors, targeting a mid-2027 commercial launch. This Indian-designed chip, built on TSMC's 12nm process, is among the first of its kind.

articles.title: 'MLB The Show Mobile' launches with card packs, PvP & pricey bundles
articles.description: Sony launched "MLB The Show Mobile" for iPhone and Android with free-to-play monetization and high hardware requirements as it pushes deeper into the mobile sports market. Sony's new MLB game Sony says it built " MLB The Show Mobile " from the ground up for smartphones instead of adapting the console version of "MLB The Show" directly. The company centered the release around collectible player cards, progression systems, and competitive multiplayer modes. Promotional material tells players to "Build your team. Set your strategy. Stack rewards." Sony is also using pre-registration bonuses to pull existing "MLB The Show" players into the new mobile ecosystem. Sony released "MLB The Show Mobile" as a free download, but the App Store listing heavily promotes paid card packs, season passes, booster bundles, and virtual currency. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.description: Omdia just shared its analysis on the US smartphone market in Q1 2026 and things are not looking great. The overall market shrank 3% year-over-year to 33.4 million units. Firstly, the Q1 2026 decline comes after smartphone manufacturers accelerated an inventory build-up in Q1 2025 in anticipation of the upcoming import tariffs imposed by the Trump Administration. Secondly, the smartphone market is starting to feel the pressure from ever-rising memory chip prices, and there's a significant slowdown in smartphone purchases. articles.title: HFCL receives a purchase order of Rs 135 cr from RailTel
articles.description: The Company had earlier undertaken the implementation of the Secure OPS Network for Indian defence forces under a project awarded by RailTel. The Company has successfully completed the design, supply, installation, and commissioning of one central data centre and 120 mini data centres at Indian defence establishments across the Country. The scope of the project included establishment of a secure defence communication network comprising hardware, software, and data centre infrastructure, along with AI-enabled network security, and was executed in accordance with the stipulated contractual requirements and prescribed technical and security specifications.
